prompt: Create a dramatic square anime illustration of exactly two teenage girls in dynamic motion, seen from a low, tilted angle as if they are falling, floating, or dancing through an abstract storm of ink. The first girl has pale blonde hair tied in a messy high ponytail with loose strands covering part of her face; she wears a white Japanese sailor school uniform with dark collar trim, a tied neckerchief, a pleated skirt, white socks, and black shoes. She is positioned on the upper-right side, body angled diagonally, one knee bent, one arm extended back, looking downward with a soft serious expression. The second girl has long black hair flowing wildly across the left side; her face is mostly hidden in shadow and hair. She wears a dark, tattered school-uniform-like dress or blouse and skirt, rendered almost as a black silhouette, with deep crimson tones around the lower fabric. Place her on the lower-left side, reaching or drifting toward the blonde girl, creating an intimate but tense two-character composition. Use a gritty monochrome palette of warm ivory, charcoal black, sepia brown, and muted blood-red accents. Style it as expressive Japanese anime concept art mixed with ink wash, scratchy pen lines, watercolor stains, splattered black ink, rough brush textures, distressed paper grain, and high-contrast chiaroscuro. Background is mostly off-white empty space with explosive black and brown ink splashes concentrated in the upper-right and lower-left corners, diagonal motion streaks, and scattered speckles. Emphasize flowing hair, pleated fabric movement, dramatic shadows, delicate faces, painterly anatomy, and a cinematic, melancholic atmosphere. No text, no border, no watermark.
